messages.content: Hi, could you please help me write an email to a hotel inquiring about availability and pricing? My desired stay would be from 30 may to 26 june 2023.

Dear Sir/Madam,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inquire about the availability and pricing of your hotel for my potential stay from 30 May to 26 June 2023.

I am planning a trip with my family and we are interested in staying at your hotel for the duration of our visit. Could you kindly let me know if you have any available rooms for the mentioned dates and what the pricing options might be? Additionally, could you please inform me if there are any promotions or packages that we can take advantage of?

If possible, it would be greatly appreciated if you could also provide us with information on the amenities and facilities that your hotel provides. This would enable us to better plan for our trip and make the most of our stay.

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to hearing back from you and hope we can arrange for a wonderful stay at your hotel.

Best Regards,
[Your Name]
Thanks! could you please also add that I already stayed at their place for 6 months a few years ago during my study exchange at Siam university?

Certainly, I can add that to the email. Here's the updated version:

Dear Sir/Madam,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inquire about the availability and pricing of your hotel for my potential stay from 30 May to 26 June 2023.

I am planning a trip with my family, and we are very interested in staying at your hotel for the duration of our visit. During my study exchange at Siam University a few years ago, I had the pleasure of staying at your hotel for 6 months, and I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. This time, I will be returning for a vacation with my family, and I was hoping to stay at your hotel once again.

Could you kindly let me know if you have any available rooms for the mentioned dates and what the pricing options might be? Additionally, could you please inform me if there are any promotions or packages that we can take advantage of?

If possible, it would be greatly appreciated if you could also provide us with information on the amenities and facilities that your hotel provides. This would enable us to better plan for our trip and make the most of our stay.

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to hearing back from you and hope we can arrange for a wonderful stay at your hotel.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]

awesome! the hotel offers different pricing depends on the length of stay. could you please add a question, whether it would be possible to rent for a full month using a monthly rate visible on their website? in addition, please mention that I am interested in a room with a bathtub (not shower)

Sure, I can add those details to the email. Here's the updated version:

Dear Sir/Madam,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inquire about the availability and pricing of your hotel for my potential stay from 30 May to 26 June 2023.

I am planning a trip with my family, and we are very interested in staying at your hotel for the duration of our visit. During my study exchange at Siam University a few years ago, I had the pleasure of staying at your hotel for 6 months, and I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. This time, I will be returning for a vacation with my family, and I was hoping to stay at your hotel once again.

Could you kindly let me know if you have any available rooms for the mentioned dates and what the pricing options might be? I noticed on your website that you offer different pricing depending on the length of stay. Would it be possible to rent for a full month using the monthly rate visible on your website? Additionally, I am interested in a room with a bathtub (not shower). Would this be possible?

If possible, it would be greatly appreciated if you could also provide us with information on the amenities and facilities that your hotel provides. This would enable us to better plan for our trip and make the most of our stay.

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to hearing back from you and hope we can arrange for a wonderful stay at your hotel.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]
what would be your suggestions for a title for this email?

Here are a few options for the email title:

1. Room Availability & Pricing Inquiry - May/June 2023
2. Returning Guest Request - May/June 2023
3. Hotel Booking Request - May/June 2023
4. Room Booking Inquiry - Monthly Rate & Bathtub Request - May/June 2023
5. Family Vacation Room Inquiry - May/June 2023

Choose the title that suits your purpose and adapts to your writing style.
just one more correction to the email please, I will be traveling alone and I don't need information about amenities and facilities

Certainly, here's the updated version:

Dear Sir/Madam,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inquire about the availability and pricing of your hotel for my potential stay from 30 May to 26 June 2023.

During my study exchange at Siam University a few years ago, I had the pleasure of staying at your hotel for 6 months, and I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. I will be traveling alone this time, and I was hoping to stay at your hotel once again.

Could you kindly let me know if you have any available rooms for the mentioned dates and what the pricing options might be? I noticed on your website that you offer different pricing depending on the length of stay. Would it be possible to rent for a full month using the monthly rate visible on your website? Additionally, I am interested in a room with a bathtub (not shower). Would this be possible?

Thank you for your kind considerations. I look forward to hearing back from you and hope we can arrange for a wonderful stay at your hotel.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]

Here is a response I received to the email you helped me create: "Nice to hear from you again.  It has been a very long time since your last stay and hope all has been well with you. 

We wish to advise that we have room available from May 30th to June 26th.  Our available room with a bathtub would be 15,900 baht (with no view) and 16,700 baht (with view), utilities excluded.  Please advise.  

Looking forward to receiving your reply.


Thank you and best regards,


Oranee"

Great! Here's a suggested response:

Dear Oranee,

Thank you very much for your prompt reply. I am delighted to hear that there is availability for my desired dates.

Regarding the pricing options you mentioned, I am interested in the room with a bathtub and a view, and would like to inquire about the utility fees. How much should I expect for the utilities per month?

Additionally, I noticed that the pricing you provided did not mention the monthly rate. Would it be possible to rent for a full month using the monthly rate visible on your website?

Thank you for your assistance and I look forward to hearing back from you.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]
thanks for the suggestion! I have a few of corrections: no need to inquire about utility fees and monthly rate.

Alright, here's the updated response:

Dear Oranee,

Thank you very much for your prompt reply. I am delighted to hear that there is availability for my desired dates.

Regarding the pricing options you mentioned, I am interested in the room with a bathtub and a view, and would like to confirm my booking for the 15,900 baht option (with no view).

Thank you for your assistance and I look forward to staying at your hotel during my upcoming trip.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]
could you please also ask if it is okay if I arrive in the morning? my flight from Finland starts on 29 of May and arrives in Bangkok in the early morning of 30th of may

Sure, here's the updated response:

Dear Oranee,

Thank you very much for your prompt reply. I am delighted to hear that there is availability for my desired dates.

Regarding the pricing options you mentioned, I am interested in the room with a bathtub and a view, and would like to confirm my booking for the 15,900 baht option (with no view).

Also, I would like to inquire if it would be possible for me to check-in early on May 30th, as my flight from Finland arrives in Bangkok in the early morning. If there is any availability and additional fees for this service, please let me know the details.

Thank you for your assistance and I look forward to staying at your hotel during my upcoming trip.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]
could you please add that my return flight on 26th of june is also in the early morning, so if it will be possible to handle everything related to check out a day before?

Certainly, here's the updated response:

Dear Oranee,

Thank you very much for your prompt reply. I am delighted to hear that there is availability for my desired dates.

Regarding the pricing options you mentioned, I am interested in the room with a bathtub and a view, and would like to confirm my booking for the 15,900 baht option (with no view).

Also, I would like to inquire if it would be possible for me to check-in early on May 30th, as my flight from Finland arrives in Bangkok in the early morning. If there is any availability and additional fees for this service, please let me know the details.

Lastly, I wanted to mention that my return flight on June 26th is also in the early morning. Would it be possible to handle everything related to check-out a day before? Please let me know if there is anything I should keep in mind related to this.

Thank you for your assistance and I look forward to staying at your hotel during my upcoming trip.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

I received a response to the email you helped me with: "We are pleased to confirm your reservation for a room with a bathtub with no view (15,900 + utilities) from May 30th (check in early morning is fine and well noted).  Check out on June 26th early morning as well, and we shall settle all bills on June 25th.  Kindly email us a copy of your passport.  Thank you very much and look forward to welcoming you soon.


Best regards,


Oranee"

Great news! Here's a suggested reply:

Dear Oranee,

Thank you very much for confirming my reservation for the room with a bathtub and no view from May 30th to June 26th. I confirm that I will be checking in early morning as requested, and I appreciate that you've noted this.

I also acknowledge your instructions to check out on June 26th early morning and settle all bills on June 25th. Thank you for letting me know.

I have attached a copy of my passport to this email, as requested.

I'm very much looking forward to my stay at your hotel and appreciate the excellent service you've provided so far.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
